title: Far Beyond
description: Far Beyond is a performance-focused modpack with extended render distance support, perfect for enjoying vanilla Minecraft with smoother gameplay
body:
# Far Beyond

> *Vanilla Minecraft, just smoother and more epic*


![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AzLasq6X/images/60fd9504677619dede95b81f47eedeb3ade6efac.png)


Far Beyond is a minimalist modpack designed to make vanilla Minecraft smoother, faster, and more immersive, without altering the original gameplay. Its main feature is support for extended render distance, letting you see far into the world while keeping excellent performance.

## Who is it for?
Any player looking for better performance and maximum render distance, while keeping the exact same vanilla gameplay with no added features.

## Features
- Optimization
- Optifine-compatible resource packs
- Extended render distance
- Shader support (Complementary Shaders)

## My Other Modpacks
Not sure if this one is the perfect fit? Here’s how it compares to the others in the same series:
| Icon | Name | Optimization | Far View | Quality of life | Advanced Tools |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AzLasq6X/1d4b447fd709b5ef811e1c8fdc27074278159d7c_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/AzLasq6X) | Far Beyond (here) | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>❌</center> | <center>❌</center> |
| [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2xZHpnEE/8c0edcd2820ea5e4de9dd3656c44242ccbf098cf_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/2xZHpnEE) | **Modium** ([link](https://modrinth.com/project/2xZHpnEE)) | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>❌</center> |
| [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QEcvhAB4/817a067ceb4198885b14c6b50fa79ebca3ca1581_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/QEcvhAB4) | **Modium Pro** ([link](https://modrinth.com/project/QEcvhAB4)) | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> |

**Optimization**: Tweaks and performance mods that make Minecraft run faster and smoother, without altering visuals or gameplay in any way

**Far View**: See terrain far beyond the vanilla render distance, with better performance thanks to simplified detail, and full support for multiplayer and shaders

**Quality of Life**: Adds small, non-intrusive features that enhance comfort, usability, and gameplay flow while preserving the vanilla experience

**Advanced Tools**: Includes creative and technical tools for experienced players such as builders, mapmakers, content creators, and redstone engineers
